prs.title: Add AGENTS.md
Record agentic invocations in User-Agent header
docs: clarify that `gh pr edit --add-reviewer` can re-request reviews
Use login-based assignee mutation on github.com
Remove auto-labels from issue templates
fix(agent-task): resolve Copilot API URL dynamically
Revert "fix: clarify scope error while creating issues for projects"
Revert "refactor: deduplicate scope error handling between api/client.go and project queries"
Migrate Windows code signing from client secret to OIDC
Add monthly pitch surfacing workflow
Update Go version requirement to 1.26+
`gh pr view` and `gh issue view`: show friendly display names for all actors
feat(repo): add --squash-merge-commit-message flag to gh repo edit
refactor: deduplicate scope error handling between api/client.go and project queries
Remove unnecessary StateReason and StateReasonDuplicate feature detection
Fix extension install error message showing raw struct instead of owner/repo
Fix incorrect integer conversion from int to uint16 in port forwarder
docs: add examples to gh issue close help text
Set COPILOT_GH env var when launching Copilot CLI
Add `--duplicate-of` flag and duplicate reason to issue close
Add --json support to `gh agent-task view`
Add --json support to `gh agent-task list`
fix: `gh project item-edit` error when editing Draft Issue with only one (title/body) flag
Add databaseId to assignees GraphQL fragment
Use pre-compiled regexp for matching Content-Type
fix(licenses): isolate generated licenses per platform (os/arch)
Fix project mutation query variable usage
fix(agent-task/capi): use a fixed CAPI API version
Fix invalid ANSI SGR escape code in JSON and diff colorization
Remove license bundling debris
Clean up project item-list query addition changes
`gh release upload`: Clarify `--clobber` flag deletes assets before re-uploading
Add usage examples to `gh gist edit` command
Remove feedback issue template
Migrate PR triage workflows to shared workflows
Add missing environment and label check to triage workflow
Add missing TODO comments for featuredetection if-statements
Add `--query` flag to `project item-list`
feat(workflow run): retrieve workflow dispatch run details
Add --no-upstream flag to repo clone
Pin REST API version to 2022-11-28
Respect `--exit-status` with `--log` and `--log-failed` in `run view`
Fork with default branch only during pr create
Add manual dispatch to bump-go workflow
chore: bump `cli/oauth` to `v1.2.2`
`gh pr edit`: Add support for Copilot as reviewer with search capability, performance and accessibility improvements
typo: dont to don't
`gh pr edit`: new interactive prompt for assignee selection, performance and accessibility improvements
Lint source.md
Fix fmt.Errorf format argument in ParseFullReference
Update contributing guidelines for clarity
Fix Windows asset URL in `copilot` command tests
`gh pr edit`: adopt interactive assignee select with search
feat: add native copilot command to shim copilot cli
ci: enable noop linters
CI: Add shell specification for temporary tag creation on Windows
ci: tag per build job
CI: Update Azure Code Signing endpoint URL
CI: Update Azure Code Signing client to 1.0.95
Update actions/checkout to v6 in extension workflow templates
feat: allow git remote names in gh repo set-default
fix: error when head and base refs are identical in pr create
chore: upgrade to `cli/oauth@v1.2.1`
fix: prevent panic when processing null project items
ci: upgrade to GoReleaser `v2`
Fix Debian CLI package link in installation guide
Error if go-licenses is not on the PATH
refactor: drop multierror in favor of std
Add Debian/Ubuntu to unofficial packages
Add PGP key rotation PoC
Isolate user-provided search query from contextual qualifiers
Polish Debian development user experience
Remove extra flag default from help usage
Refactor cfg out of CAPI Client
Update third-party licenses and dependencies
`gh pr edit`: Ensure empty arrays for reviewers in PR API calls
Integrate license checks back into lint workflow
CI: Update lint govulncheck to use source mode
chore: add `workflow_dispatch` to govulncheck triggers
chore: add basic linters
`gh agent-task create`: support `--custom-agent`/`-a` flag
Add `isImmutable` to `release list` JSON output
Improve `api` command docs around `--input` and `--field`
Exclude `third-party` from Golangci-lint formatting paths
Apply `go fix` to remove deprecated `// +build` tags
Fix `--interval` flags docs in `gh pr checks`
Mention `pr checks` in `run list` docs
Fix typo in comment for `gh issue develop` branch checkout command
💡 (gh repo delete) Add warning when `--yes` is ignored without a repository, Closes: #12033
Use "release" sentinel value for release attestation verification
Fix gh attestation verify to work when Public Good Instance of Sigstore is unavailable
fix `gh pr edit`: do not fetch V1 projects on unsupported GitHub hosts
Improve docstring for release-create
Fix `auth login` and `auth refresh` to use UNIX socket
`gh agent-task create`: Fix targetting upstream instead of default repo
`gh agent-task create`: Fix `--follow` not killing the progress indicator
fix(cache delete): report correct deleted count for key and key+ref deletions
`gh pr edit`: Only fetch org teams for reviewers when required
refactor: use strings.FieldsFuncSeq to reduce memory allocations
visible for  `release verify`  and `release verify-asset` cmd
Align triage.md with current triage process
Consolidate actor-mode signals into ApiActorsSupported
define err in go func instead of use err defined in outer scope
fix(issue): avoid fetching unnecessary fields for discovery
Fix typo: remove extra space in README.md link
fix: clarify scope error while creating issues for projects
feat(pr diff): add --exclude flag to filter files from diff output
`gh pr create`: login-based reviewer requests and search-based interactive selection
`issue develop`: prevent .git/config corruption on repeated `--name` invocation
build: customizable install `prefix`
feat(browse): add blame flag
feat(pr): add changeType field to files JSON output
fix(issue list): reject pull request-only search qualifiers
Fix redundant API call in gh issue view --comments (#12606)
fix: error when --remote flag used with repo argument
Bundle licenses at release time
Migrate issue triage workflows to shared workflows
feat(cache delete): allow for delete all caches for a ref
Introduce multiselect with search without wiring into commandsets
Add gh browse --actions flag
fix(gist): add support for editing & viewing large files
feat: implement gh `pr revert`
